title: FactSet (FDS) Stock Gains 2% Following Q2 Earnings Beat
text: FactSet's (FDS) Q2 revenues grow year over year but miss estimates by a slight margin.

title: FactSet Appoints Elisha Wiesel to Board of Directors
text: NORWALK, Conn., March 24, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — FactSet Research Systems Inc. (NYSE: FDS | NASDAQ: FDS), a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, today announced the appointment of Elisha Wiesel to its Board of Directors. Wiesel is a founding partner and the Chief Risk Officer of ClearAlpha Technologies, an emerging investment manager. Previously, […]...

title: FactSet Research (FDS) Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: FactSet (FDS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.11% and 0.13%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: FactSet (FDS) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: FactSet's (FDS) second-quarter fiscal 2023 earnings and revenues are expected to have increased year over year.

title: 10 Biggest Companies Reporting Earnings in the Fourth Week of March 2023
text: The fourth quarter 2022 earnings season is now almost over. However, fewer companies mentioned the term “recession” in the conference call transcripts this time.
